allow: PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($excel\) { "Excel COM available: " + $excel.Version; $excel.Quit\(\) } else { "Excel COM not available" })
Bash(cd /tmp/gamx && cat xl/workbook.xml | tr '>' '>\\n' | grep -i sheet)
PowerShell($cmds = 'node','npx','python','py','php'; foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $p = \(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($p\){ "$c -> $\($p.Source\)" } else { "$c -> \(none\)" } })

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\dulguun" && find Downloads Pictures Desktop "AppData/Local/Temp" -maxdepth 3 -type f \\\( -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.jpg" -o -iname "*.jpeg" -o -iname "*.svg" -o -iname "*.webp" \\\) -newermt "2026-06-08 11:00" 2>/dev/null | head -30)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 Name,Length,LastWriteTime)
